description:
Welcome to Pie Pie Cafeteria, an irresistible puzzle where round little desserts meet, collide, and transform into increasingly delicious treats. Inspired by the Suika style, dive into a charming café where combining identical sweets is the key to fulfilling orders, earning extra time, and keeping everything under control before the mess overflows.

Each stage features a different container, such as boxes, cups, mugs, and even coffee machines, completely changing how sweets fall, roll, and merge. Planning every drop makes all the difference. A well thought out combination can free space, create chain reactions, and save your run at the very last second.

With light physics, a relaxing pace, and clear goals driven by customer orders, Pie Pie Cafeteria offers the perfect balance between strategy and delightful chaos. It is the kind of game that invites you to play just one more level, always discovering a new sweet, a new fusion, or an unexpected solution.

Cozy, addictive, and full of personality, Pie Pie Cafeteria is the ideal puzzle for players who love accessible challenges, cute visuals, and the delicious satisfaction of seeing everything fall into place at the right moment.
